entry.title: Why Singapore Works (For Me)
entry.summary: SV gave me scale. Taiwan gave me roots. Singapore gave me perspective. This is what the city actually does to you.

A tech hub trying to replicate something that already existed elsewhere.`),mdx("p",null,"I was wrong in a more interesting way."),mdx("h2",null,"What I got"),mdx("p",null,"Singapore doesn\u2019t try to be Silicon Valley."),mdx("p",null,"It doesn\u2019t need to."),mdx("p",null,"It runs on a different model \u2014 less mythology, more execution. Less narrative, more structure."),mdx("p",null,"And for where I was in my life, that mattered."),mdx("p",null,"Because I didn\u2019t need inspiration."),mdx("p",null,"I needed stability."),mdx("h2",null,"The January Loop"),mdx("p",null,"In January 2026, I went back to Silicon Valley for a short trip."),mdx("p",null,`Stayed at my aunt\u2019s place.

The need to prove something \u2014 quieter.`),mdx("p",null,"During that trip, I interviewed with a new company."),mdx("p",null,`Not as a reach.
Not as a \u201Cmaybe I\u2019ll get lucky.\u201D`),mdx("p",null,"Just\u2026 a conversation."),mdx("p",null,"A few rounds later, I signed."),mdx("h2",null,"What Changed"),mdx("p",null,"If this had happened a year earlier, it would have meant something different."),mdx("p",null,`Validation.

Less posturing.
People are building things, but they\u2019re not constantly narrating it.`),mdx("p",null,"That changes how you think."),mdx("p",null,mdx("strong",{parentName:"p"},"It forces routine.")),mdx("p",null,"The city is structured. Predictable. Efficient."),mdx("p",null,`At first, that feels limiting.
Then it becomes grounding.`),mdx("p",null,`After the chaos of leaving the US in 40 days,
that structure matters more than I expected.`),mdx("p",null,mdx("strong",{parentName:"p"},"It puts you in between worlds.")),mdx("p",null,"Time zone, geography, culture \u2014 everything sits between East and West."),mdx("p",null,"You start seeing trade-offs more clearly."),mdx("p",null,"And once you see them, you can\u2019t unsee them."),mdx("h2",null,"What Doesn\u2019t Work"),mdx("p",null,mdx("strong",{parentName:"p"},"The heat.")," Still not negotiable."),mdx("p",null,mdx("strong",{parentName:"p"},"The visa structure.")," Clear, but always present in the background."),mdx("p",null,mdx("strong",{parentName:"p"},"The emotional distance.")," It takes time to build real connections here. Less dependency on external validation.`),mdx("p",null,"More\u2026 control."),mdx("h2",null,"The Net"),mdx("p",null,"I\u2019m here until July."),mdx("p",null,"Then I go back to Taiwan."),mdx("p",null,`This time, it\u2019s not a forced move.
